title: Cape Town, Western Cape — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Cape Town, Western Cape: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Cape Town is a city in Western Cape with a population of 4,005,000. The Mother City, famous for Table Mountain, stunning beaches, vibrant waterfront, and world-class wine regions.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
